titles.title: Are You Ready Now to Face Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Someday we will meet in heaven Standing at the presence of the Lord He will reward those who obey Him Accept those who received Him in their hearts

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Are you ready now to face Jesus? Are you doing now His will? Are you keeping all the commandments that He gave? Are you ready now to face the Lord?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don't waste the time that He has given Spend each day with Jesus in your heart Always praying in the Spirit and always give Him glory to His name
